title: A Miracle on the Hudson
description: Step into the shoes of the crew during the emergency landing of Flight 1549 on the Hudson River.

takeoff.title: Flight 1549 Takes Off
takeoff.text:
It is a freezing winter afternoon in New York. Shortly after takeoff, a flock of birds collides with the aircraft. Both engines lose all thrust.

Captain Sullenberger takes control. 'My aircraft,' he tells the co-pilot.

You must decide on your next action immediately.

choices.text: Try to turn back to LaGuardia Airport
Prepare for landing on the Hudson River

questions.prompt: What is the past simple form of the verb 'collide'?

laguardia_attempt.title: Too Dangerous
laguardia_attempt.text:
The flight computer calculations show that the aircraft is too low and slow. Trying to turn back would cause a crash in a populated area.

You must change plans immediately and land on the river!

hudson_prepare.title: Brace for Impact
hudson_prepare.text:
You steer the aircraft towards the Hudson River. The flight attendants shout: 'Brace! Brace! Heads down! Stay down!'

The plane glides smoothly over the bridge and touches down on the freezing water. The fuselage remains intact, but water begins to enter.

choices.text: Evacuate onto the wings and slides

questions.prompt: What command did the flight attendants shout?

evacuation.title: The Rescue
evacuation.text:
Passengers step onto the wings and inflatable slides. Ferries and rescue boats arrive within minutes.

All 155 people on board are rescued. The captain checks the cabin twice to make sure it is empty. This is a true miracle!

Flight completed successfully! You have earned the Hero Pilot badge.

questions.prompt: How many people (passengers and crew) were rescued in total?
